transcript.text: Namaste, Hotel Sunrise Jaipur mein Priya bol rahi hoon, aapka kaise madad kar sakti hoon?

Deluxe room ka price chaar hazaar rupaye per raat hai.Aapka stay kab ka plan hai?Ji, aapka check‑in aur check‑out date bata dijiye, taki main availability check kar sakun.
